label_groups.name: default

label_defs.name: Invoice Header
label_defs.instructions: Top-level header fields of a vendor invoice (numbers, dates, parties, totals).

moon_form.name: Invoice Number
moon_form.instructions: The unique invoice identifier assigned by the vendor, found in the header area near 'Invoice Number' or 'Invoice #'. Example: '0118617-IN', '68F1048859'.

moon_form.name: Invoice Date
moon_form.instructions: The date the invoice was issued, in the header area near 'Invoice Date' or 'Date'. Example: '8/4/2018', '16.05.2017'.

moon_form.name: Vendor Name
moon_form.instructions: The full legal name of the vendor (the company issuing the invoice), typically at the top of the document. Example: 'YORK SOLUTIONS, LLC', 'HP PPS Sales Sdn. Bhd.'.

moon_form.name: Vendor Address
moon_form.instructions: The mailing address of the vendor (the company issuing the invoice), near the vendor name in the header. Include street or P.O. Box, city, state or region, and postal code.

moon_form.name: Bill-To Name
moon_form.instructions: The legal name of the entity being billed (the customer receiving the invoice). Distinct from the vendor. Example: 'Motorola Solutions'.

moon_form.name: Bill-To Address
moon_form.instructions: The customer's billing address, found in a 'Bill To' or 'Invoice To' block. Distinct from the vendor's address.

moon_form.name: Subtotal
moon_form.instructions: The pre-tax subtotal amount of the invoice. If no separate subtotal line is shown, leave unannotated.

moon_form.name: Tax Amount
moon_form.instructions: The total tax applied to the invoice (GST, VAT, sales tax). If no tax line is shown, leave unannotated.

moon_form.name: Total Amount
moon_form.instructions: The final amount due on the invoice, including any taxes. Example: '5,600.00', '714.51', '$4,310.99'.

moon_form.name: Payment Terms
moon_form.instructions: Payment terms text, e.g. 'Net 30', 'NET 15 Days', '75 DAYS'. Found near terms or due date in the header.

moon_form.name: PO Number
moon_form.instructions: The customer's purchase order number associated with this invoice. Example: 'NP95125990'. Distinct from any vendor-side order or reference number.

label_groups.instructions: Extract invoice header fields (invoice number, invoice date, vendor name, vendor address, bill-to name, bill-to address, subtotal, tax amount, total amount, payment terms, PO number) from Motorola vendor invoices.
